sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: What's Going On With Tractor Supply Stock Today?
feed.summary: Tractor Supply (NASDAQ: TSCO) stock is down 8.85% today after the company reported first-quarter financial results that missed analyst expectations for earnings per share and sales. The decline is also influenced by a broader market downturn, with the S&P 500 and Consumer Discretionary sector experiencing slight losses. The company reaffirmed its 2026 GAAP EPS and sales guidance, but faces technical headwinds with its stock trading below key moving averages.

feed.title: BNY Mellon High Yield Fund keeps monthly payout at $0.0175
feed.summary: The BNY Mellon High Yield Strategies Fund (NYSE: DHF) has declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.0175 per share, maintaining the same payout as the previous month. This dividend will be payable on May 21, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 7, 2026, with an ex-dividend date also on May 7, 2026. The declaration was made by the Fund's Board of Trustees on April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial raises quarterly dividend by 6%
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. (NYSE:AMP) has increased its regular quarterly cash dividend by 6% to $1.70 per share, payable on May 22, 2026. This announcement follows a strong fourth quarter in 2025 where the company exceeded Wall Street expectations for earnings and revenue. Analysts have reiterated varied ratings, with Raymond James maintaining a "Strong Buy" and BMO Capital a "Market Perform."

feed.title: Transcript: Knowles Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Knowles (NYSE: KN) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with revenue up 16% year-over-year to $153 million and EPS up 50% year-over-year to $0.27, both exceeding guidance. The company anticipates continued strong organic growth and margin expansion throughout 2026, driven by robust demand in MedTech, defense, industrial, and electrification markets, and expects revenue growth to exceed its 4-6% target. Management highlighted strategic execution leveraging unique technologies for custom solutions, particularly in defense markets, leading to premium margins and confident future outlook.

feed.title: Jefferies lowers Vistra Energy stock price target on valuation By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jefferies has lowered its price target for Vistra Energy (NYSE:VST) to $192 from $203, while maintaining a Buy rating, citing the company's valuation metrics as a compelling entry point. Despite the stock being down 30% since September 2025, it has delivered a 30.5% return over the past year. The firm believes the stock is not fully pricing in potential upside from future data center contracts, even with an overhang from ongoing PJM reform.

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon issues $1.5 billion in senior notes due 2032 and 2037
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon has issued $1.5 billion in senior medium-term notes, comprising two equal tranches due in 2032 and 2037. This move, reported via an SEC filing, highlights the financial services giant's consistent financial stability, marked by 56 consecutive years of dividend payments. The issuance follows strong first-quarter 2026 results, where the company surpassed market expectations for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: PSEG shareholders approve board nominees and key proposals at annual meeting
feed.summary: PSEG shareholders have re-elected all management nominees to the board of directors and approved executive compensation, increasing shares for the employee stock purchase plan, and ratifying Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent auditor. Proposals to eliminate supermajority voting requirements did not pass. This comes amidst varied analyst ratings for the utility company, which has a market cap of $40 billion and a consistent dividend payment history.

feed.title: M. Susan Hardwick Joins Edison International, Southern California Edison Boards of Directors
feed.summary: M. Susan Hardwick has been elected as an independent director to the boards of Edison International and Southern California Edison, effective April 23, 2026. She brings over 35 years of leadership experience in regulated utilities and energy, including prior roles as CEO and CFO of American Water Works Company, Inc. Hardwick's expertise in utility operations, finance, risk management, and regulatory affairs is expected to significantly benefit the boards.

feed.title: Parker Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend 11% to $2.00 per Share
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation announced an 11% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $2.00 per share, marking the 304th consecutive quarterly dividend. This decision reflects the Board's confidence in the company's consistent cash flow generation and long-term outlook. Parker Hannifin has a 70-year track record of increasing its annual dividend, placing it among the top S&P 500 companies.

feed.title: Jabil declares $0.08 quarterly dividend payable June 2 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share, payable on June 2, 2026, marking 21 consecutive years of dividend payments. The company's stock appears overvalued according to InvestingPro analysis, despite strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results driven by AI and server demand, leading multiple analysts to raise their price targets. Jabil is also investing in community education through a significant donation to St. Petersburg College.

feed.title: Trees are good for the earth and help lower energy bills
feed.summary: Xcel Energy encourages customers in Texas and New Mexico to strategically plant trees to help manage energy use and lower bills, especially during summer months. Properly placed trees can provide shade, block wind, and reduce the need for air conditioning, leading to energy bill savings. The company also advises calling 811 before digging to ensure utility line safety and provides resources for optimal tree planting and energy-saving tips.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) Trading 1.3% Higher After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) saw its share price increase by 1.3% after Barclays upgraded the stock from an "equal weight" to an "overweight" rating and significantly raised its price target to $625.00 from $425.00. This upgrade, alongside other recent analyst target increases, reflects positive sentiment driven by Seagate's strong Q2 earnings, revenue growth, and expansion into high-capacity products for AI and other demanding workflows. However, the article also notes potential risks such as heavy insider selling, a high P/E ratio, and volatility associated with new leveraged ETFs.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) Releases Q2 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) has updated its Q2 2026 earnings guidance, projecting EPS between $0.700 and $0.760 and revenue of $1.7 billion, while also raising its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $2.95-$3.05. Despite the positive guidance, the stock traded down to $79.69, and company insiders have sold over $7 million worth of shares in the past 90 days. Analysts currently maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock with an average price target of $95.74.

feed.title: Frontier AI and the Future of Defense: Your Top Questions Answered
feed.summary: This article addresses the impact of "frontier AI" on cybersecurity and defense, highlighting the challenges posed by its rapid weaponization potential despite its innovative capabilities. It answers ten common questions from security leaders, emphasizing the need for machine-speed defense, AI-driven platforms, and a proactive shift-left strategy to counter autonomous threats. The article also introduces Palo Alto Networks' Unit 42 Frontier AI Defense service, aimed at helping organizations identify attack paths before they are exploited.

feed.title: T-Mobile increases shareholder return program by $3.6 billion
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. has announced a significant increase of $3.6 billion to its 2026 Shareholder Return Program, bringing the total authorized returns to $18.2 billion through the end of 2026. This program encompasses both share repurchases and cash dividends, funded by available cash and debt issuances. The enhancement reflects management's aggressive share buyback strategy and comes amidst speculation of a full combination with Deutsche Telekom, which is currently in preliminary discussions.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines declares quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines announced a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share, payable June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026. The airline has demonstrated a commitment to shareholder returns, having raised its dividend for three consecutive years with a 25% growth over the past year. This announcement comes amidst discussions of increased jet fuel costs due to geopolitical conflicts and varying analyst outlooks on airline stocks.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.12
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on May 26th to shareholders of record on May 8th. The company recently reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings of $1.05 EPS and $2.17 billion in revenue, also providing strong guidance for Q1 and FY 2026. Analysts currently rate Howmet Aerospace as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $266.89.

feed.title: Jefferson Capital (JCAP) lifts revolving credit commitments to $1,150,000,000
feed.summary: Jefferson Capital, Inc. (JCAP) has increased its aggregate revolving credit commitments by $150,000,000, bringing the total to $1,150,000,000 through Amendment No. 8 to its Credit Agreement. This amendment also raises the maximum cap on future incremental increases to $1,425,000,000, allowing for additional potential increases of up to $275,000,000. Aside from these changes to the revolving credit capacity, the underlying Credit Agreement remains substantially the same.

feed.title: Duke Energy’s Robinson Nuclear Plant approved to operate until 2050
feed.summary: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission has renewed the operating license for Duke Energy's Robinson Nuclear Plant, allowing it to continue operations until 2050. This 20-year extension supports grid reliability, energy affordability, and is expected to result in cost savings for customers by utilizing existing generation capacity. The plant is a significant power source for 570,000 homes and contributes substantially to Duke Energy's Carolina fleet.

feed.title: Affiliate files Form 144 to sell restricted shares (STLD)
feed.summary: An affiliate of Steel Dynamics Inc. (STLD) has filed a Form 144 notice, indicating a proposed sale of common stock acquired through restricted stock awards. The filing specifies three award lots totaling 1,717, 1,825, and 1,458 shares, with grant dates ranging from 2022 to 2024. This action is a notice of intent to sell rather than a completed transaction, with specific details like sale prices and brokers not yet disclosed.

feed.title: Principal Financial: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. (PFG) reported first-quarter net income of $424.6 million, or $1.93 per share. Adjusted earnings came in at $2.07 per share, surpassing analysts' average estimate of $2.01 per share. Although revenue reached $3.53 billion, adjusted revenue of $3.52 billion did not meet Street forecasts of $4.11 billion.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) files S-3 shelf to register debt securities
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT) has filed an S-3 shelf registration to offer debt securities. This registration, dated April 23, 2026, allows the company to issue unsecured, unsubordinated debt, with specific terms regarding interest rates, maturity, and aggregate amounts to be detailed in future prospectus supplements. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment, acquisitions, capital expenditures, dividends, and pension funding.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial raises quarterly dividend by 6%
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. announced a 6% increase in its regular quarterly cash dividend to $1.70 per share, payable on May 22, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026. This news follows a strong fourth-quarter performance in 2025, where the company exceeded Wall Street's earnings and revenue expectations. Analysts have maintained positive ratings, with Raymond James reiterating a "Strong Buy" and BMO Capital a "Market Perform."

feed.title: KORE Group Investor Alert: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of KORE Group Holdings, Inc. - KORE
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is investigating the proposed sale of KORE Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KORE) to Searchlight Capital Partners, L.P. and Abry Partners. The firm is examining whether the proposed cash consideration of $9.25 per share for KORE shareholders adequately values the company. KSF invites KORE shareholders who believe the transaction undervalues the company to contact them to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On April 23rd, 322.82K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.49 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On April 23rd, the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ) saw significant options trading activity. A total of 322.82K contracts were traded, contributing to an open interest of 1.49 million contracts. This high volume indicates considerable speculative or hedging interest in the leveraged NASDAQ 100 ETF.

feed.title: SPY ETF Falls 0.4%
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF (SPY) experienced a decrease of 0.4%. This movement indicates a slight downward trend for the ETF, which tracks the performance of the S&P 500 index.

feed.title: Charles Schwab declares $0.32 quarterly dividend per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per common share, maintaining its 38-year dividend payment streak. The dividend is payable on May 22, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 8, 2026. The company also declared dividends on several series of preferred stock and reported strong first-quarter results, although analyst outlooks are mixed.

feed.title: SunOpta gets court approval for $6.50 per share Refresco deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: SunOpta Inc. has received final approval from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice for its acquisition by an affiliate of Refresco Holding B.V., valued at $6.50 per share in cash. The Canadian competition clearance condition has also been satisfied. The acquisition is still subject to further regulatory clearances and standard closing conditions.

feed.title: Bank of America declares quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share on common stock, payable on June 26, 2026. This marks the bank's 12th consecutive year of dividend increases and 56th consecutive year of payments. The Board also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.75 per share on its 7% Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, Series B, payable on July 24, 2026.

feed.title: IT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding purchasers of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) common stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, of the upcoming May 18, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline in a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false or misleading statements regarding its growth rates and its ability to handle industry challenges, particularly concerning its consulting revenue targets and contract value growth rates. Investors who purchased Gartner common stock during this period may be entitled to compensation and are encouraged to contact the law firm to join the class action.

feed.title: Southern California Edison Declares Dividends
feed.summary: Southern California Edison's board of directors declared quarterly dividends for its Series G, L, M, and N preference stocks. These dividends, ranging from $0.3125 to $0.46875 per security, are scheduled to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. Southern California Edison, an Edison International company, serves approximately 15 million people across 5 million customer accounts.

feed.title: Edison International Announces Board Expansion and CFO Transition
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) has expanded its board to 12 members, electing M. Susan Hardwick as an independent director to enhance expertise in regulated utilities and infrastructure planning. Concurrently, the company announced a CFO transition: Maria Rigatti will step down on July 3, 2026, and retire on September 1, 2026, with Aaron D. Moss taking over as CFO on July 3. The board also amended bylaws to clarify officer duties amidst ongoing industry transition.

feed.title: South Carolina nuclear plant gets 20 more years to power 570,000 homes
feed.summary: Duke Energy's Robinson Nuclear Plant in Hartsville, SC, received a 20-year operating license renewal from the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission, allowing it to operate until 2050. This extension enables the plant to continue providing 759 MW of electricity to approximately 570,000 homes, support nearly 500 jobs, and contribute about $28 million in annual local taxes. The renewal is part of Duke Energy's strategy to maintain reliability and affordability for customers in the Carolinas, where nuclear energy meets about 51% of energy needs.

feed.title: KeyCorp to acquire British investment banking firm in strategic European expansion
feed.summary: KeyCorp is expanding into Western Europe by acquiring a British investment banking firm. This acquisition aims to create new opportunities for private equity sponsors and corporate clients on both sides of the Atlantic for mergers and acquisitions. The move signifies a strategic European expansion for KeyCorp.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) offers autocal lable contingent‑coupon notes linked to Wells Fargo stock
feed.summary: UBS is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to the common stock of Wells Fargo & Company, with a trade date of April 23, 2026, and maturity on April 27, 2029. These notes provide contingent coupon payments if the underlying stock meets certain barriers and are subject to automatic call if the stock reaches an initial level. Investors face the risk of substantial loss, including the entire principal, if the notes are not called and the final level is below the downside threshold.

feed.title: PSEG (NYSE: PEG) investors approve pay, ESPP and auditor at 2026 meeting
feed.summary: PSEG shareholders approved executive compensation, an increase in shares for the Employee Stock Purchase Plan, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor for 2026 at their Annual Meeting on April 21, 2026. All management-nominated directors were elected with strong support. However, three proposals to eliminate certain supermajority voting requirements failed to pass as they did not reach the required 80% of outstanding shares.

feed.title: Joby Aviation Stock Falls as LA Air Taxi Vertiport Plan Meets Certification Reality
feed.summary: Joby Aviation's stock fell 7.1% after announcing plans with Reuben Brothers to convert a Los Angeles helipad into a vertiport for its electric air taxis, an initiative aimed at establishing an L.A. network. The announcement coincided with a broad decline in air-taxi stocks, as investors remain focused on Joby's progress with certification, financial updates, and production targets ahead of its Q1 earnings call on May 5th. Despite testing its first production model and aiming for limited U.S. operations this year, the company faces significant regulatory hurdles and market skepticism regarding its ambitious goals.

feed.title: Before the bell, FIS posts Q1 results May 8 and hosts 8:30 webcast
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS), a financial services technology leader, will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, May 8th, before market open. The company will also host a live webcast of its earnings conference call for the investment community at 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. Investors can access the webcast and a replay afterward through the Investor Relations section of FIS's homepage.

feed.title: June 15 payout set: Southern California Edison declares 4 dividends
feed.summary: Southern California Edison's board of directors has declared four quarterly dividends for its preference stocks: Series G, L, M, and N. These dividends are scheduled for payment on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. Southern California Edison, an Edison International company, is a major electric utility serving approximately 15 million people in Central, Coastal, and Southern California.

feed.title: Digital Realty Reports First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Digital Realty (DLR) has announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, releasing detailed earnings and supplemental materials online. The company also posted investor presentations and plans to participate in several major investor conferences in May and June 2026. According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DLR is rated Neutral, driven by improving financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook, though valuation due to a high P/E is a concern.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines shareholders get 18.75-cent dividend on June 4
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share, payable on June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026. This announcement provides a scheduled cash distribution to the airline's investors. The dividend declaration was made by Delta's Board of Directors on April 23, 2026.

feed.title: Rollins (NYSE: ROL) grows Q1 revenue 10% as margins compress and M&A continues
feed.summary: Rollins (NYSE: ROL) reported a 10.2% revenue increase to $906.4 million in Q1 2026, driven by organic growth and acquisitions across all service lines. Despite top-line growth, operating margins compressed to 16.1% due to higher insurance, fleet, selling, and employee costs, and cash flow tightened primarily due to tax and interest payment timing. The company continues its acquisition strategy, closing three small deals and announcing the $90 million Romex Pest Control acquisition, while maintaining a strong balance sheet and reiterating its 2026 organic and inorganic growth expectations.

feed.title: Charter Communications (CHTR) director gets $225K restricted stock grant
feed.summary: Charter Communications director Carolyn J. Slaski received a grant of 918 restricted shares of Class A Common Stock, valued at $225,000, which will fully vest in 2027. Following this grant, Slaski directly holds 2,346 shares. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 filing, indicating an insider acquisition.

feed.title: $1.5B senior notes issued by BNY Mellon (NYSE: BK)
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (NYSE: BK) has issued $1.5 billion in senior notes through two tranches: $750 million of 4.540% Fixed Rate / Floating Rate Callable Senior Medium-Term Notes Series J due 2032, and $750 million of 5.085% Fixed Rate / Floating Rate Callable Senior Medium-Term Notes Series J due 2037. This offering was registered under a shelf registration statement on Form S-3 and detailed in an 8-K filing, which also included a legal opinion from Sullivan & Cromwell LLP.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $1.81
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE: APD) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.81 per share, with an ex-dividend date of July 1st and payment on August 10th. The company has a 43-year history of increasing dividends, with a current payout ratio of 55.4%, well-covered by earnings. Shares traded up to $303.67, near their 52-week high, following a Q1 EPS beat and strong guidance for Q2 and the full fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Organic Revenue Flat, Stock Price Drops for Thermo Fisher Scientific
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific experienced an unusual stock drop of over 10% despite reporting better-than-expected first-quarter sales and profit results. Analysts are concerned about the company's long-term prospects due to organic revenue growth of only 1.6% over the past two years and a steady decline in adjusted operating margin over five years. Despite these concerns, analysts still consider Thermo Fisher to be a strong company in the healthcare sector.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) Releases Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.05 EPS
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) reported its quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates by $0.05 with an EPS of $0.78. Despite the positive earnings surprise, the stock traded down by $1.84 to $79.69, though Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $95.74. Recent insider stock sales by the CFO and VP were also disclosed, alongside significant hedge fund activity in the company.

feed.title: Bank of America declares quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share
feed.summary: Bank of America has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share on common stock, maintaining continuous payments for 56 years and raising it for 12 consecutive years. The dividend is payable on June 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 5, 2026. This announcement follows strong first-quarter 2026 results and positive analyst ratings, with the stock currently deemed undervalued by InvestingPro.

feed.title: [144] Apple Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by Apple Inc. (AAPL) dated April 23, 2026, concerning the proposed sale of 1534 shares of common stock, acquired through Restricted Stock Units, with an aggregate market value of $419,042.78. The filing indicates the securities are to be sold on NASDAQ via Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC. It includes standard disclosures for Form 144, such as information about the filer, issuer, and the nature of the securities acquisition.

feed.title: [Form 4] CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS, INC. /MO/ Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Charter Communications director Mauricio Ramos reported the acquisition of 918 shares of Class A Common Stock as restricted stock, valued at $225,000. This equity award, not an open-market purchase, will fully vest in 2027, increasing Ramos's direct holdings to 9,380 shares. The transaction was detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing, providing transparency on insider compensation.
